name: long_tail_markdown_fenced_output

inputs.page_text: Acme GmbH — Onboard your team in minutes, not weeks. Built for RevOps leaders at scaling SaaS companies. We serve the software industry with a team that answers the phone. Registered office: Musterstraße 1.

name: long_tail_duplicate_field_first_wins

inputs.page_text: Acme GmbH — Onboard your team in minutes, not weeks. Built for RevOps leaders at scaling SaaS companies. We serve the software industry with a team that answers the phone. Registered office: Musterstraße 1.
inputs.model_output: {"fields":[{"field":"icp","value":"RevOps leaders at scaling SaaS companies","evidence_snippet":"Built for RevOps leaders at scaling SaaS companies","confidence":0.8},{"field":"icp","value":"anyone with a budget","evidence_snippet":"Acme GmbH","confidence":0.9}]}

survivors.icp: RevOps leaders at scaling SaaS companies

rubric: conflicting duplicates: the gate keeps the FIRST occurrence deterministically — the card shows one value per field

name: long_tail_whitespace_normalized_page

inputs.page_text: Acme GmbH   —   Onboard your team in minutes, not weeks.

rubric: evidence matches inside a whitespace-heavy page as long as the snippet is verbatim

name: long_tail_snippet_with_punctuation

inputs.page_text: »Wir liefern.« sagt die Nordlicht Consulting GmbH seit 2009.

rubric: quoting styles around the snippet do not matter; the snippet itself must

name: long_tail_very_long_snippet

survivors.value_proposition: Pallets tracked door to door across Europe

rubric: an over-long but verbatim snippet still evidences its field
